description: Demo question bank for Hybrid UI Try-these chips (EN / 中文).

questions.en: How do I set up ACC Docs folder structure to align with HK standard?
questions.zh: 如何按港标在 ACC Docs 搭建文件夹结构？

questions.en: Show a real WIP discipline folder tree example for HK CDE in ACC
questions.zh: 给我一个 ACC 里符合港标的 WIP 专业文件夹树示例

questions.en: How should ACC folder permissions be configured for HK CDE compliance?
questions.zh: 如何按港标配置 ACC 文件夹权限？

questions.en: How to run HK-aligned approval workflows in ACC
questions.zh: 如何在 ACC 跑符合港标的审批流程？

questions.en: How do I create a naming standard in Docs per DEVB requirements?
questions.zh: 如何按 DEVB 要求在 Docs 创建命名标准？

questions.en: How do I create an ACC project aligned with CIC BIM Standard?
questions.zh: 怎样创建一个符合 CIC BIM Standard 的 ACC 项目？

questions.en: How can a CIC-aligned CDE be implemented in ACC?
questions.zh: 符合 CIC 的 CDE 怎么在 ACC 落实？

questions.en: How do I build an approval workflow that meets ISO 19650?
questions.zh: 怎么做一个符合 ISO 19650 要求的审批流？

questions.en: What is WIP in Hong Kong CDE?
questions.zh: 香港 CDE 里的 WIP 是什么？

questions.en: What is the difference between WIP and Shared?
questions.zh: WIP 和 Shared 有什么区别？

questions.en: What is the WIP Gateway?
questions.zh: WIP Gateway 是什么？

questions.en: What is the Authorisation Gateway?
questions.zh: Authorisation Gateway 是什么？

questions.en: What are Project Information Requirements (PIR)?
questions.zh: 什么是 Project Information Requirements（PIR）？

questions.en: I want to know more about CIC Standard
questions.zh: 我想了解 CIC Standard

questions.en: What is the DEVB BIM Harmonisation guide?
questions.zh: DEVB BIM Harmonisation 指南是什么？

questions.en: What are the four CDE containers in HK practice?
questions.zh: 港标实践中的四容器 CDE 是什么？

questions.en: How do I set folder permissions in Autodesk Docs?
questions.zh: 如何在 Autodesk Docs 设置文件夹权限？

questions.en: How do I share files in ACC Docs?
questions.zh: 如何在 ACC Docs 分享文件？

questions.en: How do I create a project in ACC?
questions.zh: 如何在 ACC 创建项目？

questions.en: How do I filter BIM model properties with Model Browser?
questions.zh: 如何用 Model Browser 过滤模型属性？

questions.en: How do I create an approval workflow in Docs Reviews?
questions.zh: 如何在 Docs Reviews 创建审批工作流？

questions.en: How do I choose Buildings vs Civil in the HK CDE Spec?
questions.zh: HK CDE Spec 里 Buildings 和 Civil 怎么选用？

questions.en: What WIP / Shared folder tree does the HK CDE Spec (Buildings) recommend?
questions.zh: HK CDE Spec（Buildings）建议的 WIP / Shared 文件夹树是什么？

questions.en: What is the file naming standard for HK BIM projects?
questions.zh: 香港 BIM 项目的文件命名标准是什么？

questions.en: What are BIM Manager responsibilities and which ACC features should they use?
questions.zh: BIM Manager的责任是什么？在ACC上他需要使用哪些功能？

questions.en: In the HK CDE Spec, can the Owner see WIP folders?
questions.zh: HK CDE Spec 里 Owner 能不能看到 WIP？

questions.en: What is the Buildings nine-segment file naming rule, and can Revision go in the filename?
questions.zh: Buildings 九段命名规则是什么？Revision 能写进文件名吗？

questions.en: What MIDP gate must pass before WF-B Shared to Published?
questions.zh: 进入 WF-B（Shared→Published）前 MIDP 门禁是什么？

questions.en: Which mandatory checklists does Buildings WF-C BD submission require?
questions.zh: Buildings WF-C BD 提交需要哪些强制检查表？

questions.en: How should EMSD_Code be used for Buildings handover and Tandem?
questions.zh: Buildings 移交和 Tandem 里 EMSD_Code 怎么用？

questions.en: In Civil naming, how does the Building field map to section codes?
questions.zh: Civil 命名里 Building 字段如何对应区段码？

questions.en: What must a Civil LandsD submission package contain at minimum?
questions.zh: Civil LandsD 提交包最少要包含什么？

questions.en: Can Civil WF-C pass without PROJECT_BOUNDARY or MODEL_FILE_LIST?
questions.zh: Civil WF-C 缺 PROJECT_BOUNDARY 或 MODEL_FILE_LIST 能否通过？

questions.en: When should Civil use EMSD_Code versus AssetClass?
questions.zh: Civil 什么时候用 EMSD_Code，什么时候用 AssetClass？
